overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a Na'vi character exploring a lush alien jungle environment on Pandora. The character walks along a rocky riverbank and wades into shallow water approaching a massive tiered waterfall with a natural stone arch formation, while floating mountains are visible in the distant sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien jungle riverbank with distant rock spire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank toward a distant rock formation

entered.detail: tall thin rock spire visible in the distance ahead
dense lush green alien vegetation lining the riverbank
calm reflective water body running alongside the path
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and patches of grass
floating rock formations visible in the sky background

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks along a rocky jungle riverbank with dense vegetation on the left and calm water on the right. A tall ancient rock spire is visible in the distance ahead, with floating mountains in the sky beyond.

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the massive waterfall that comes into view

entered.detail: massive multi-tiered waterfall cascading down the cliff face
natural rock bridge formation spanning the top of the waterfall
steep layered rock wall with vegetation growing on ledges

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from rocky shore to wading in shallow water as a massive tiered waterfall reveals itself ahead. The ancient rock spire fades to the left rear as the natural stone arch atop the waterfall becomes visible in the center distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with mist and rock arch

events.description: water depth increases slightly as character approaches the waterfall base

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the water approaching the base of the massive waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading closer to the waterfall, which now dominates the center of the view. The natural stone arch becomes more prominent overhead as the cliff face looms larger on the right, with mist rising from the falling water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base observation point with flying wildlife

events.description: character stops walking and looks up toward the rock arch
large flying creature (banshee) flies overhead from left to right above the waterfall
character turns to observe the surrounding jungle cliffs and vegetation

agents.ego_description: standing still at the waterfall base, looking up at the flying creature and panning to view the surrounding cliffs

notable_agents.action: large winged banshee flying across the sky above the waterfall from left to right

entered.detail: lush green trees and plants growing on the side cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the waterfall base to observe the surroundings. A large banshee flies overhead above the natural arch, after which the character pans to examine the lush vegetation covering the side cliffs, with the waterfall now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a jungle riverbank that gradually opens up to a massive, mist-shrouded waterfall. It begins with a Na'vi character walking beside a rocky shore flanked by dense vegetation, with a distant rock spire and floating mountains framing the horizon. As the character transitions from the land into the shallow water, the rock spire recedes to the left while a tiered waterfall and a natural stone arch emerge as the central focus. The scene then expands as the character wades closer, causing the cliff face to loom larger on the right and the overhead arch to become more prominent amidst the rising mist. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the base of the falls to watch a banshee fly overhead before panning across the lush, cliff-side greenery.
